title: Remove Numerology service and hide prices from all services

requirements.summary: Remove the Numerology service entry entirely from the Services page listing so it no longer appears to users.
acceptanceCriteria: The Numerology service card/section is not visible on the Services page.
No reference to Numerology appears in the services list.

file_operations.description: Remove the Numerology service from the services array or filter it out before rendering so it no longer appears in the services list on the page.

requirements.summary: Remove the price/pricing display from all service entries on the Services page so no pricing information is shown to users.
acceptanceCriteria: No price, fee, or cost information is displayed for any service on the Services page.
All other service details (name, description, features) remain intact.

file_operations.description: Remove or conditionally hide any price, fee, or cost display elements from the service cards/entries so pricing information is not shown to users while preserving all other service details such as name, description, and features.
